title: Apollo GraphQL Agent Skills Repository
citation: Apollo GraphQL Agent Skills GitHub repository README, accessed 2026-05-04.
permitted_uses: Agent workflow guidance for Apollo GraphQL schema, operation, client, server, Rover, and MCP review tasks.
claims_supported: The repository presents Apollo GraphQL Agent Skills for AI coding agents working with Apollo GraphQL tools and technologies.
The README describes installation through the Skills CLI and optional Claude Code plugin or GitHub CLI workflows.
The README lists skills for Apollo Client, Apollo Server, GraphQL schema design, GraphQL operations, Rover, and Apollo MCP Server.
The README states the repository is MIT licensed and says the code is experimental and for reference purposes only.
claims_not_supported: That Apollo skills should be installed as runtime product dependencies.
That Apollo-specific guidance replaces selected package versions, repository tests, generated schema artifacts, or OpenClinXR architecture decisions.
That skills tracking main branch are stable enough for regulated or high-stakes workflow claims without pinning and verification.
